title: Brasilaelia × lilacina
taxonomy: Brasilaelia × lilacina is a hybrid orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a cross between the genera Brasilaelia and Lilacina. The classification of Brasilaelia × lilacina is further categorized under the subfamily Epidendroideae. This orchid is known for its unique and exotic appearance. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin conditions.
